title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: HERMISTON UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Utility payment assistance for water, electricity, natural gas, oil, propane, wood, pellets, and other heating fuels. Payments are issued directly to vendors and assistance may only be received once over per 12 month period. 1565 N 1st Street Suite 1 Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: LIHEAP: 60% State Median Income Emergency Assistance: Must have shut-off notice or have been disconnected Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday 8am-noon (541) 276-1926 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 289-7755 Main phone Main phone (541) 276-1926 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, address, photo ID, and Social Security cards for all members of the household, current utility bill, shut-off notice LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Morrow, Umatilla, and Wheeler Counties Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HERMISTON
